title: Robert Downey Jr. spent 11 years saving the universe. Now he's trying to end it.
text:
The Avengers: Doomsday trailer just dropped, and the internet cannot get over one detail. Robert Downey Jr. spent 11 years playing the hero who saved the universe as Iron Man. In this movie, he is not the hero. He is Doctor Doom, the villain trying to end it.

The trailer also reportedly assembles the largest cast in Marvel history in one film, pulling in actors from the X-Men and Fantastic Four movies alongside the core Avengers, all sharing a scene for the first time ever.

The man who once died to save everyone is now the reason they might not survive.
highlights: sharing a scene for the first time ever
